title: norysca cordifolia
intro: Norysca cordifolia, also known as Noyau Cordifolia or Bitter Apple, is a plant species native to tropical Africa. The plant's bark, leaves, and roots have been traditionally used in folk medicine, exhibiting medicinal properties such as anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Norysca cordifolia include treating fever, rheumatism, and gastrointestinal issues, as well as offering antioxidant and antiseptic properties. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made into infusions, decoctions, or ointments to utilize its medicinal properties.
